diagrams.title: Try-Catch-Finally Flow Control
diagrams.description: Shows the execution flow through try, catch, and finally blocks
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how execution flows through exception handling blocks

diagrams.title: Catch Block Order Example
diagrams.description: Shows correct and incorrect ordering of catch blocks
diagrams.purpose: Remember that more specific exceptions must be caught first
